analysis.consistency: Consistent with standard D&D 5e spell structure. All required fields are present and formatted correctly.
analysis.quality: High quality. The mechanical effects are clear and balanced for a 3rd-level spell. The combination of advantage on Wisdom/Death saves and maximizing healing output is potent but situational.

mechanics.effect_summary: Grants advantage on Wisdom and Death Saving Throws, and healing received is maximized for all targets within range.
mechanics.balance_check: Appropriate for a 3rd-level Abjuration spell. While maximizing healing is strong, it requires concentration and applies only to healing received during the duration, not healing already present.
